Name: INSTRUMENT_HEADER
Description: Header inherited from native instrument file

Name: RECEIPT
Description: The list of operations performed on this file

Name: DRP_CONFIG
Description: Pipeline details to go from the raw file to this file

Name: EXT_DESCRIPT
Description: Description of each extension in the file

Name: TRACE1_VAR
Description: Flux variance in fiber 1 (populated with nans)

Name: BARYCORR_Z
Description: Barycentric correction in redshift in km/s

Name: TRACE3_DRIFT
Description: Nightly instrument drift measured in km/s
